projectDescription: AI-powered CLI tool that generates professional technical documentation from Python source code using AST analysis and Google Gemini.
keyFeatures: Advanced AST analysis of Python source code
AI-powered documentation generation using Google Gemini
Flexible configuration via CLI arguments or TOML files
Detailed code structure extraction (classes, functions, methods, signatures)
publicApiSurface: docugen generate [PATH] - Main CLI command to generate documentation
scan_python_files() - Discovers Python files respecting .gitignore rules
parse_project() - Extracts AST metadata from Python files
prepare_for_ai() - Normalizes parsed data for LLM consumption
GeminiClient.generate_markdown() - Generates documentation content via Gemini API
render_readme() - Renders final Markdown using Jinja2 templates
load_runtime_config() - Loads configuration from multiple sources
